---
title: "06 Console output"
format: html
---

> library(foreach)
> 
> #foreach(i=1:length(fullExpression)) %do% {
> #  ...
> #}
> 
> fullExpression <- readline(prompt="Enter your expression: ")
Enter your expression: #print(paste("Hello", name)) is the syntax for printing
> 
> #AI code:
>   # TRUE if character is a non-symbol (letter/digit/etc.), FALSE for ()./\
> IsChar <- function(ch) {
+   nchar(ch) > 0 && !ch %in% c("(", ")", ".", "/", "\\")
+ } #nchar(ch) > 0 makes sure the argument isn't empty
> 
> # Sets runningRead to the first char of fullExpression and advances fullExpression
> PrimeNewTokenRead <- function() {
+   runningRead    <<- substr(fullExpression, 1, 1)
+   fullExpression <<- substr(fullExpression, 2, nchar(fullExpression))
+ }
> 
> # Appends the first char of fullExpression to runningRead and advances fullExpression
> ReadLetter <- function() {
+   if (fullExpression != "") {
+     runningRead    <<- paste0(runningRead, substr(fullExpression, 1, 1))
+     fullExpression <<- substr(fullExpression, 2, nchar(fullExpression))
+   }
+ }
> 
> # ── Main tokenising loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
> 
> tokens <- c()
> PrimeNewTokenRead()
> 
> processed <- FALSE
> while (!processed) {
+ 
+   # Peek at boundary characters
+   lastChar  <- substr(runningRead,    nchar(runningRead),    nchar(runningRead))
+   firstChar <- substr(fullExpression, 1, 1)   # "" when fullExpression is empty
+ 
+   cat(sprintf(
+     "[Reading] runningRead: %-12s | firstChar: %-4s | tokens so far: [%s]\n",
+     paste0("'", runningRead, "'"),
+     paste0("'", firstChar,   "'"),
+     paste(tokens, collapse = ", ")
+   )) #paste0 and sprintf are used to create strings but not print them, then cat concatenates and prints to the console.
+ 
+   if (lastChar %in% c("(", ")", ".") ||
+       (IsChar(lastChar) && !IsChar(firstChar))) {
+     # ── Token boundary reached: flush runningRead ──
+     tokens <- c(tokens, runningRead)
+     if (fullExpression != "") {
+       PrimeNewTokenRead()
+     } else {
+       processed <- TRUE
+     }
+ 
+   } else if (IsChar(firstChar)) {
+     # ── Still inside a multi-char token: keep reading ──
+     ReadLetter()
+ 
+   } else {
+     stop("Parse error: may be trying to bind a syntax symbol ('",
+          firstChar, "').")
+   }
+ }
[Reading] runningRead: '#'          | firstChar: 'p'  | tokens so far: []
[Reading] runningRead: '#p'         | firstChar: 'r'  | tokens so far: []
[Reading] runningRead: '#pr'        | firstChar: 'i'  | tokens so far: []
[Reading] runningRead: '#pri'       | firstChar: 'n'  | tokens so far: []
[Reading] runningRead: '#prin'      | firstChar: 't'  | tokens so far: []
[Reading] runningRead: '#print'     | firstChar: '('  | tokens so far: []
[Reading] runningRead: '('          | firstChar: 'p'  | tokens so far: [#print]
[Reading] runningRead: 'p'          | firstChar: 'a'  | tokens so far: [#print, (]
[Reading] runningRead: 'pa'         | firstChar: 's'  | tokens so far: [#print, (]
[Reading] runningRead: 'pas'        | firstChar: 't'  | tokens so far: [#print, (]
[Reading] runningRead: 'past'       | firstChar: 'e'  | tokens so far: [#print, (]
[Reading] runningRead: 'paste'      | firstChar: '('  | tokens so far: [#print, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '('          | firstChar: '"'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste]
[Reading] runningRead: '"'          | firstChar: 'H'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"H'         | firstChar: 'e'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"He'        | firstChar: 'l'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hel'       | firstChar: 'l'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hell'      | firstChar: 'o'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello'     | firstChar: '"'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello"'    | firstChar: ','  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello",'   | firstChar: ' '  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello", '  | firstChar: 'n'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello", n' | firstChar: 'a'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello", na' | firstChar: 'm'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello", nam' | firstChar: 'e'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: '"Hello", name' | firstChar: ')'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (]
[Reading] runningRead: ')'          | firstChar: ')'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name]
[Reading] runningRead: ')'          | firstChar: ' '  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' '          | firstChar: 'i'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' i'         | firstChar: 's'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is'        | firstChar: ' '  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is '       | firstChar: 't'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is t'      | firstChar: 'h'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is th'     | firstChar: 'e'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the'    | firstChar: ' '  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the '   | firstChar: 's'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the s'  | firstChar: 'y'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the sy' | firstChar: 'n'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syn' | firstChar: 't'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the synt' | firstChar: 'a'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the synta' | firstChar: 'x'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax' | firstChar: ' '  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax ' | firstChar: 'f'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax f' | firstChar: 'o'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax fo' | firstChar: 'r'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for' | firstChar: ' '  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for ' | firstChar: 'p'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for p' | firstChar: 'r'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for pr' | firstChar: 'i'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for pri' | firstChar: 'n'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for prin' | firstChar: 't'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for print' | firstChar: 'i'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for printi' | firstChar: 'n'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for printin' | firstChar: 'g'  | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
[Reading] runningRead: ' is the syntax for printing' | firstChar: ''   | tokens so far: [#print, (, paste, (, "Hello", name, ), )]
> 
> cat("\nFinal tokens:", paste(tokens, collapse = " | "), "\n")

Final tokens: #print | ( | paste | ( | "Hello", name | ) | ) |  is the syntax for printing
